description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The current Active Pioneer Primes are:

summary: Add Solana Pioneer Chain Instance To Keel
description: Adds the Solana Instance Configuration Document to Keel's Pioneer Chain Primitive and specifies its associated parameters.

summary: Activate Launch Agent 6 Pioneer Primitive On Plasma
description: Activates the Pioneer Chain Primitive for Launch Agent 6 on Plasma, establishing the Pioneer Incentive Pool address and applicable terms.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
